dobrota.name: Kindness
dobrota.description: Genuine sympathy for others and willingness to help even at your own cost.

zlost.name: Anger
zlost.description: Tendency to flare up and lash out aggressively at irritants.

chrevogudie.name: Gluttony
chrevogudie.description: Poor restraint with food, drink, and bodily pleasures.

pokhot.name: Lust
pokhot.description: Overpowering desire—hard to resist temptation or craving.

ambitsioznost.name: Ambition
ambitsioznost.description: Drive toward big goals—unwilling to settle.

kreativnost.name: Creativity
kreativnost.description: Unconventional thinking and rich imagination—you spot unexpected angles.

apatiya.name: Apathy
apatiya.description: Deep indifference to what happens around you and to your fate.

nervoznost.name: Nervousness
nervoznost.description: Chronic anxiety and unease—with a leaning toward panic.

egoizm.name: Selfishness
egoizm.description: Puts personal interests ahead of everyone else's.

samokontrol.name: Self‑control
samokontrol.description: Manages impulses and emotions even under heavy pressure.

kharizma.name: Charisma
kharizma.description: Natural magnetism and ability to rally people behind you.

khladnokrovie.name: Level‑headedness
khladnokrovie.description: Steady calm under strain—still thinks clearly when stressed.

fanatizm.name: Fanaticism
fanatizm.description: Blind, unwavering devotion to idea, creed, or cause.

doverchivost.name: Credulity
doverchivost.description: Trusts others easily—not expecting betrayal or deception.

mudrost.name: Wisdom
mudrost.description: Deep grasp of life and human nature—you see essentials quickly.

litsemerie.name: Hypocrisy
litsemerie.description: Hides true motives behind a mask of virtue.

malodushie.name: Cowardice
malodushie.description: Struggles to act decisively in the face of danger or hardship.

chestnost.name: Honesty
chestnost.description: Speaks truth even when costly or risky.

khrabrost.name: Courage
khrabrost.description: Steps toward peril for convictions and loved ones.

upryamstvo.name: Stubbornness
upryamstvo.description: Holds firm and seldom backs away from chosen choices.

reshitelnost.name: Decisiveness
reshitelnost.description: Decides swiftly and shifts into action immediately.

vernost.name: Loyalty
vernost.description: Unshakable commitment to allies and principles.

khitrost.name: Cunning
khitrost.description: Favours roundabout paths, manoeuvres, odd angles over frontal clash.

miloserdie.name: Mercy
miloserdie.description: Forgiving, sparing, ready to grant second chances.

lyubopytstvo.name: Curiosity
lyubopytstvo.description: Insatiable pull toward learning and discovery.

melankholiya.name: Melancholy
melankholiya.description: Inclination to sadness, inwardness, and heavy reflection.

optimizm.name: Optimism
optimizm.description: Belief something good waits ahead—finding light even in trouble.

paranoyya.name: Paranoia
paranoyya.description: Chronic suspicion and expectation of threats from anyone.

zhadnost.name: Greed
zhadnost.description: Desperate need to hoard and reluctance to share.

shchedrost.name: Generosity
shchedrost.description: Genuine readiness to give and share without tallying reciprocity.

raschetlivost.name: Calculation
raschetlivost.description: Cool pragmatism—every step weighed for gain and logic.

umstvennaya-otstalost.name: Slow wit
umstvennaya-otstalost.description: Limited capacity to learn or wrestle with complex ideas.
